hero.sub1: We'll watch your posture with your webcam.

watch.d: A camera at your side checks your shoulder and neck angles 30 times a second.

detect.d: Forward head, chin resting, shoulder tilt, slouching, screen too close, shoulder asymmetry — six types.

adjust.d: Gentle nudges, not nagging. We cheer your recovery with a score.

privacy.body: Posture recognition runs 100% on-device, with nothing sent outside. It works even offline.

privacyPoints.localOnly: Posture data stays on this computer

changeLater: You can change this later in System Settings
